title: Onboarding - Animations
scenario: Verify animations are functional across all onboarding screens including initial setup loading, 'Well hello, first thing first...', 'Up-to-Date', 'Personal', and 'Organized' screens.
steps: Launch the application and observe the initial setup loading screen for any animations.
Proceed to the 'Well hello, first thing first...' screen and verify that all animations (e.g., transitions, text reveals, or graphic movements) play correctly.
Navigate to the 'Up-to-Date' screen and confirm that animations are functioning as expected.
Navigate to the 'Personal' screen and check that animations are displayed properly.
Navigate to the 'Organized' screen and ensure all animations are working correctly.
expected: All animations on the initial setup loading screen and the 'Well hello, first thing first...', 'Up-to-Date', 'Personal', and 'Organized' screens play smoothly and correctly without any glitches or freezes.
